summary: Trusted read-only workspace action stays inside the approved boundary. Evidence: derived_from_block_event, workspace_scoped_target.
remediation: Hold the action behind approval until the evidence trail is reviewed.
Prefer a safe pinned dependency or read-only fallback while the risky path is investigated.
